description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and an open floor plan, featuring large glass windows and doors that provide ample natural light. The structure is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including several trees and shrubs, which enhance its curb appeal. The front facade includes a covered porch area with transparent glass panels, leading to the main entrance. The interior layout is visible, showing multiple rooms arranged around a central living space, with contemporary furnishings and fixtures. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the blue-tinted glass and lush vegetation. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a strong connection to the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and landscaped surroundings. The design features a covered porch and an open, light-filled interior layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and prominent glass windows with lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the arrangement of rooms, and additional greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back rooms, more glass windows, and a mix of trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the open floor plan, flat roof, and the distribution of exterior vegetation.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
